title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.340 - Claims against township, collection
text:
65.340.  Claims against township, collection. — When any claim or account, or any part thereof, shall be allowed by the township board of directors, they shall draw an order upon the township trustee in favor of the claimant for the amount so allowed   said order to be signed by the president of said board, and attested by the township clerk and delivered to said claimant.
(RSMo 1939 § 13983) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12306; 1919 § 13219; 1909 § 11707
